# 🌿 PULL REQUEST PORTAL HANDSHAKE

## 📝 Change Description
Please provide a high-level summary of the modifications implemented and the specific issues they address.

Fixes / Closes: # (link to issue if applicable)

## 🛠️ Type of Alteration
- [ ] Bug patch (non-breaking correction of a logical anomaly)
- [ ] Structural feature (non-breaking functional addition to CMS/terminal)
- [ ] Chore update (configuration change, package bump, no logic alteration)
- [ ] Security hardening (firewall rules, validation meta, rule additions)

## 📋 Integrity Checklist
Before dispatching this request, confirm that you have completed these checks:

- [ ] My code aligns with the repository's formatting rules (`npm run lint` / `.prettierrc`).
- [ ] I have verified that the project compiles with zero errors using `npm run build`.
- [ ] No private environment keys or Firestore credentials are hardcoded in the codebase.
- [ ] I have written tests or manually validated the modified logic across desktop and mobile.
- [ ] Any modifications to system tables are documented inside `README.md` or related markdown guides.

## 🖼️ Visual Diagnostics (If applicable)
Please attach high-contrast screenshots or terminal capture logs showing the UI alterations.

---

```
[PR GATEWAY HANDSHAKE COMPLETE]: DISPATCH VERIFIED. READY FOR HUMAN EVALUATION.
```
